controls.title: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity

props.name: description
props.value: Control objective for commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.title: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management
The entity has an identified security policy
The entity has a structure, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities

props.name: description
props.value: Organizational structure and assignment of responsibility.

controls.title: The entity has a process to identify, select, and develop people
The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities
The entity implements logical access security measures
The entity restricts access to types of data and system components

props.name: description
props.value: Access restrictions to support confidentiality and integrity.

controls.title: The entity restricts logical access to the system
The entity implements logical access security software and infrastructure

props.name: description
props.value: System access controls including MFA and encryption.

controls.title: The entity has procedures to detect and respond to security events

props.name: description
props.value: Detection and monitoring of security events.

controls.title: The entity monitors system operations and responds to anomalies
The entity authorizes, designs, develops, and implements changes
The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities
The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors
